description_long: This house features a rectangular footprint with a steeply pitched gable roof clad in a light gray material. The front facade is dominated by a large, multi-paneled garage door and a small window above it, while the rear facade mirrors this with a similar window arrangement but no garage. The long side of the house displays a series of evenly spaced windows and a single entry door, suggesting a practical, utilitarian design. The roof includes three dormer windows, providing additional light and space to the upper level. The exterior walls appear to be finished in a tan or light brown material, possibly wood or siding, with minimal decorative elements. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for suburban or semi-urban neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular, two-story house with a steep gable roof, large garage door, dormer windows, and tan exterior walls. The design is simple and functional, with symmetrical window placement and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large multi-paneled garage door, a small window above it, and the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long wall with several windows, a single entry door, and three dormer windows on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view with a window arrangement similar to the front but without a garage door, and the same gable roof structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the full length of the gable roof and the arrangement of the dormer windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a single standard door on the side and a large multi-paneled garage door at the front, with no porch or decorative elements.
